title: 8 fixes — Cover-save bio guard, body-scroll-lock refcount, sign-out cache wipe, FCM dedupe
notes: FIX: Cover image save no longer wipes your bio text and other profile fields if your login session has expired or the network drops mid-save (was overwriting bio JSON with empty object on RLS rejection).
FIX: Page no longer gets stuck unscrollable when you close 2 stacked modals (e.g. post-detail → edit-post over it → close in any order). New ref-counted body-scroll-lock used by all 6 modals.
PRIVACY FIX: Signing out now clears the server-backed blocks cache + follows cache + FCM token cache for your account. Next user signing in on the same device gets a clean slate.

FIX: FCM token registration no longer spams Supabase with an update every hour on token refresh — only writes if the token actually changed. Also skips the permission prompt if you've already denied it (was wasting a Notification.requestPermission + getToken round-trip on every TOKEN_REFRESHED).
FIX: OTA updater no longer double-registers its check timer + visibilitychange listener if the app re-runs auth state change handler.

FIX: Tapping Messages tab while already on Messages now resets in-place (close active chat + scroll to top) instead of remounting — was causing brief realtime-channel collision that broke message updates until next navigation.

FIX: Service worker registration now uses cache-busting query param + updateViaCache:'none' so deploys reliably push new SW versions to all clients (was risking stale SW serving old chunk URLs after deploys).
FIX: Chat photo upload on the no-compression fallback path now properly rolls back temp message + blob URL on network reject (previously only handled RLS error, leaked on offline drop).
